Artyom Yagovdik

Engineering Team Lead & Architect

Back to Hub
Summary

Engineering Lead with an MSc in Computer Science and over a decade of building complex commerce platforms. Focus on high-scale availability, robust middleware architectures, and leading efficient cross-functional engineering teams.

Experience

Engineering Team Lead

Y1 Digital AG // 2024—Present // Frankfurt, DE
  • Orchestrating technical roadmaps and mentoring cross-functional engineering teams.
  • Architecting Node.js middleware for mission-critical ERP and SAP integrations.
  • Driving architectural decisions to align business ROI with long-term system stability.

Lead Web Developer

Y1 Digital AG // 2020—2024 // Frankfurt, DE
  • Headed Magento 2 migrations and implemented high-availability AWS architectures.
  • Standardized CI/CD processes, significantly reducing deployment cycles.
  • Engineered performance optimizations resulting in substantial load-time reductions.

Tech Lead

A2 Design Inc. // 2016—2019 // Omsk, RU
  • Developed distributed systems and subscription engines for North American markets.
  • Scaled payment processing workflows using Stripe for large customer bases.
  • Pioneered automation in legacy environments to stabilize delivery pipelines.
Technical

Architecture

High-availability, distributed systems, Reliability Engineering, Cloud native patterns.

Backend

Node.js, TypeScript, PHP (Magento 2), Ruby on Rails, MySQL, Redis.

Infrastructure

AWS (ECS, Lambda, S3), Docker, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).

Commerce
